companies.name: Example Tech
tailoring_priorities: Emphasize measurable platform reliability and API performance gains.
Highlight product-minded collaboration with design and product stakeholders.
Show leadership through mentoring and architecture guidance without overselling people management.
companies.value_proposition: Product-minded senior engineer who improves delivery speed and reliability for customer-facing SaaS teams.
companies.motivation: Strong fit for a product-led SaaS team that values execution quality, developer productivity, and measurable user impact.
companies.application_context: Direct application for backend or full-stack product engineering roles.

companies.name: Northstar Cloud
tailoring_priorities: Bring out CI/CD improvements and internal tooling work.
Stress cross-functional ownership and clear technical communication.
Keep examples close to platform enablement and engineering effectiveness.
companies.value_proposition: Senior engineer who turns product and workflow friction into reliable internal tools and faster release pipelines.
companies.motivation: Good match for a smaller platform company where broad technical ownership and delivery discipline matter.
companies.application_context: Secondary target for a shared CV version aimed at platform-focused companies.
